library.description: مرجع عربي مستقل لفرع الصوت في SDL3: الأجهزة، SDL_AudioStream، تنسيقات العينات، وماكرو الصوت الرسمية.

kind.description: استدعاءات تنفذ فعلاً، تغيّر حالة، أو تعيد نتيجة، أو تبني مورداً.

identity.name: SDL_SetAudioStreamGetCallback
identity.titleArabic: ضبط callback that runs when data is requested الصوت الدفق

summary.actualTranslationArabic: ضبط callback that runs when data is requested الصوت الدفق
summary.actualMeaningArabic: ضبط callback that runs when data is requested الصوت الدفق.
summary.purposeArabic: تستخدم هذه الدالة عندما تحتاج إلى ضبط callback that runs when data is requested الصوت الدفق داخل التطبيق أو داخل مسار التنفيذ المرتبط بها.
summary.whyUseArabic: القيمة الحقيقية هنا هي الأثر التنفيذي الذي يحدثه الاستدعاء أو النتيجة التي يعيدها إلى التطبيق.
summary.carriedValueArabic: القيمة العملية لهذا الاستدعاء تظهر في ناتجه (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information. This only fails if stream is NULL. وفي التغيير الذي يحدثه على المورد أو الحالة المرتبطة به.
summary.sourceDescription: Set a callback that runs when data is requested from an audio stream.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.descriptionArabic: يمثل المعامل stream من النوع SDL_AudioStream * القيمة أو المورد الذي يعتمد عليه هذا الاستدعاء.
parameters.originalDescription: the audio stream to set the new callback on.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.descriptionArabic: يمثل المعامل callback من النوع SDL_AudioStreamCallback القيمة أو المورد الذي يعتمد عليه هذا الاستدعاء.
parameters.originalDescription: the new callback function to call when data is requested from the stream.

parameters.name: userdata
parameters.descriptionArabic: يمثل المعامل userdata من النوع void * القيمة أو المورد الذي يعتمد عليه هذا الاستدعاء.
parameters.originalDescription: an opaque pointer provided to the callback for its own personal use.

remarks: This callback is called before data is obtained from the stream, giving the callback the chance to add more on-demand.

The callback can (optionally) call SDL_PutAudioStreamData () to add more audio to the stream during this call; if needed, the request that triggered this callback will obtain the new data immediately.

The callback's additional_amount argument is roughly how many bytes of unconverted data (in the stream's input format) is needed by the caller, although this may overestimate a little for safety. This takes into account how much is already in the stream and only asks for any extra necessary to resolve the request, which means the callback may be asked for zero bytes, and a different amount on each call.

The callback is not required to supply exact amounts; it is allowed to supply too much or too little or none at all. The caller will get what's available, up to the amount they requested, regardless of this callback's outcome.
Clearing or flushing an audio stream does not call this callback.
This function obtains the stream's lock, which means any existing callback (get or put) in progress will finish running before setting the new callback.
Setting a NULL function turns off the callback.
details.returns: (bool) Returns true on success or false on failure; call SDL_GetError () for more information. This only fails if stream is NULL.
details.threadSafety: It is safe to call this function from any thread.
